content:
# Molecular Dynamics Simulation

**Summary**: A computational method to simulate the physical movements of atoms and molecules in a system.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-al-arfaj|Al-Arfaj, 2017]] applied molecular dynamics simulation to study the behavior of illite-smectite mixed layers at the atomic level.

- [[2021-alqam|ALQAM, 2021]] applied molecular dynamic (MD) simulations to study the behavior of asphaltenes in carbonated water at a microscopic level.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2021-alqam|ALQAM, 2021]] applied molecular dynamic (MD) simulations to study the behavior of asphaltenes in carbonated water at a microscopic level.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Molecular modeling revealed that the interlayer spacing changed during hydration, confirming swelling behavior. ([[2017-al-arfaj|Al-Arfaj, 2017, p. 14]])

- The IFT was reduced by 13-17% in asphaltenes-carbonated water systems. ([[2021-alqam|ALQAM, 2021, p. 42]])
